setup-worktree-unix: test -f "$ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH/.env.local" && cp "$ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH/.env.local" .env.local || echo 'No .env.local found in main worktree — skipping'
test -f "$ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH/.env.e2e" && cp "$ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH/.env.e2e" .env.e2e || echo 'No .env.e2e found in main worktree — skipping'
